item.title: Greeting Card Maker [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Greeting Card Maker [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Greeting Card Maker
(Internet Apps)
Wishing card maker tool design birthday cards. Greeting card maker software designs colorful wishing card in minutes. Greeting card maker tool facilitates users to design high quality wishing cards for different occasions like Deewali, Christmas, Fathers day, Mothers Day and many other occasions. Greeting card maker program is here for you and enables you to design stylish wishing cards using different designing objects like line, text, pencil, arc, star, ellipse and many more. Software designs wishing cards in multiple shapes including rectangular, rounded rectangular etc.Have you ever think of designing of colorful birthday cards for your parents? If yes then Greeting card maker utility facilitates you to design good quality wishing cards without having any prior training or programming skills. Birthday card maker utility offers print preview functionality which prevents further printing error while creating stylish birthday and other greeting cards.

[read more]

item.title: Wedding Card Designer [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Wedding Card Designer [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Wedding Card Designer
(Internet Apps)
Download advance wedding card designer tool. Wedding Card Designer software helps to makes amazing marriage cards. Wedding Card Designer utility provides best feature to create and print bulk numbers of invitation cards using flexible printing setting in simplified manner. Easily use invitation card designer program supported by Windows operating system to makes best quality wedding cards in different designing objects. Wedding Card Designer utility provides specified platform to generate high resolution marriage invitation cards using advance color and background setting in easiest way. Advance reliable Wedding Card Designer software facilitates user to send generated invitation card at specified file using email setting. Cost effective card designing application provides inbuilt designing tools like pencil, text, word art, clip art and other for quickly customize created wedding cards in simplified manner. Best wedding card generator utility designs invitation cards in various designing objects like rectangle, ellipse, rounded rectangle and CD/DVD.

[read more]

item.itunes:summary:
Make Business Card
(Office Apps)
Click on www.makebirthdaycards.net url to download Make Business Card software helps users for generating attractive visiting cards, membership cards in minimal time. Application is able to make meeting cards, corporate cards of multiple shapes like rectangle, square, star, triangle etc. Business cards maker application uses pencil, line, text, pictures, ellipse and other card designing objects for producing good looking commercial cards.

Order Business Cards Designer tool is beneficial for making company members card.Want to know, how to make colorful cards? Make Birthday Cards
(Office Apps)
If you want to make homemade birthday wishing cards for your friends and relatives then visit company website www.makebirthdaycards.net and start designing birthday card of different font, style, shape, color using Make Birthday Cards software. Professional card designing application does not require extra resource or monthly setup fee to craft birthday card and print generate cards on paper. Useful cards printing utility import you family photo and other images from Windows operating system install computer library.

item.title: Business Cards Designer Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Cards Designer Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Business Cards Designer Software
(Internet Apps)
Utility generates printable business card. Business Cards Designer Software creates card using wizard or with blank format. Business Cards Designer Software manufactures customized and eye catching visiting, membership, ID cards. Software from www.businesscardsdesigner.net uses WordArt text-styling feature to generate beautiful business cards, postal, address labels etc. Business Cards Designer Software manufactures card using various image designing tool option including text, pencil, ellipse, arc, line, color, pictures, barcodes, star, rectangle, ellipse and many more other objects. ID cards maker software designs cards and labels with inbuilt password setting options while manufacturing to prevent unauthorized access. Visiting cards designing tool accurately saves all created card at user specified location.www.businesscardsdesigner.net software is capable enough to design labels with new format or can edit in existing format. Reliable and affordable Business Cards Designer Software allows producing multiple copies of cards and labels with different barcode and text value using Data Set Series feature. Visiting cards maker tool supports Windows based operating systems like Windows 11, 10, 9,8 etc to manufacture customized and good looking cooperate cards and labels. Business card maker application provide advanced feature to select desired image or picture from library while manufacturing of cards and labels. Users can design labels in various types of folds like Quarter Fold (Top Flip), Half Fold (Side Flip), Half Fold (Top Flip), Quarter Fold (Side Flip) using card and labels designing software.

[read more]

item.itunes:summary:
Business Cards Designer
(Internet Apps)
Create company cards with designer program. Business Cards Designer tool helps to generate amazing colorful employee cards. Best Business Cards Designer application provide by company with more feature that is available on website www.businesscardsdesigner.net to design printable commercial cards using different fonts, color and image setting. Easily download advance and cost effective Business Cards Designer software from website www.businesscardsdesigner.net that is specialized and complete solution to create and print business or membership cards in different designing objects like Rectangle, Text, Barcode, Picture, Arc, Line, Ellipse, Pencil and more as per user requirement. Best card designing utility provides advance feature to create new business card with blank or wizard format and also modify existing card image using various feature of program in easiest and simplest manner. Professional and affordable Business Cards Designer software introduces by company on URL www.businesscardsdesigner.net for any big as well as small business organization to create attractive or colorful visiting cards with multicolor and using different stylish fonts or background templates in easiest and fastest way.

item.itunes:author: businesscards1
item.itunes:summary:
Birthday Cards Designer Software
(Internet Apps)
Software to create wonderful birthday cards. Birthday Cards Designer Software creates multicolored b-day greeting cards. Want to surprise your friends on their b’day by presenting eye-catching b’day cards in simplified manner? Birthday Cards Designer Software provides affordable way to make numerous well wishing b’day cards in convenient manner. Company provides incredible and innovative Birthday Cards Designer Software that facilities user to manufacture your own handmade birthday cards with new or editing exist card format on computer system. B-day card printing utility has ability to build most beautiful birthday greeting cards using multiple designing object tools.Searching for application to create stylish b-day cards for sending warm wishes to your special friends? Download new released Birthday Cards Designer Software to produce bulk number of attractive birthday wising cards with help of advance or flexible printing setting on computer system.

item.title: claudemods-pyqt6terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-pyqt6terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]
item.description:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can

change the terminal theme



[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]
